local_validation.summary: channel-symbol-lens-flow-valid? now validates chosen entry, circulation, and increased vitality without requiring source-attributed provenance. channel-core-ontology-multi-lens-band.fk seeds expression, sovereignty, vitality, choice, attribution, circulation, value, and no-force as open-entry words, runs them through entry/sound/semantic/domain/relation/observation lenses plus bridge, inversion, and circulation recipes, and returns 111111 across source and binary sibling kernels. Existing channel lens proofs still return 900, 11111, and 111111.

phase_gate.reason: Local open-entry multi-lens proof is complete; CI remains pending until the PR branch is pushed.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The channel symbol-lens flow now admits open-entry words when they are chosen, run, circulated, and observed with increased vitality; attribution remains recorded provenance rather than an entry gate.
public_endpoints: Form open-entry core ontology multi-lens proof
test_flows: Seed eight core principle words as open-entry rows.
Verify each row carries entry, sound, semantic, domain, relation, and observation lenses.
Verify bridge, inversion, and circulation recipes are represented in JSON grammar.
Send one open-entry offer and one sensing receipt per word through CHANNEL-MSG.
Confirm channel-symbol-lens-flow-valid? accepts open-entry offers through chosen entry, circulation, and increased vitality.
